why_us.subtitle: Why Choose Us
why_us.description: We believe a clean home is the foundation of happiness. At Yindee Clean, we provide more than just cleaning—we deliver professional care with transparency and heart.

points.point1_desc: Every member of our staff is rigorously trained to ensure high-quality service and professional conduct.
points.point2_desc: We use eco-friendly products and modern tools designed to protect your home's delicate surfaces.
points.point3_desc: Our systematic approach includes planning and quality checks to ensure consistent excellence.
points.point4_desc: Your satisfaction is our priority. We tailor our services to meet your specific needs and expectations.

upholstery.subtitle: Upholstery Cleaning
upholstery.description: Restore freshness to your sofa, mattress, and fabric surfaces with our professional deep-cleaning process. We effectively remove stains, odors, and embedded dust for a cleaner, healthier home.
upholstery.trust: Safe for all fabric types · No harsh chemicals
upholstery.hero_subtitle: Bring your furniture back to life
upholstery.description_long: We help restore freshness to your favorite sofa and mattress. Say goodbye to deep stains and hidden dust, and enjoy a cleaner, more comfortable home that’s safe for everyone in your family.

process.label: What You Get
process.title: Deeper Than Surface Clean
process.desc: We go beyond surface cleaning by extracting dirt, dust mites, and allergens hidden deep inside. This ensures your mattress and sofa are truly clean, not just on the outside. Plus, our process dries quickly so you can get back to comfort without long waiting times.

features.sofa_desc: Restore the look and comfort of your favorite sofa. Sit back and relax without worrying about stains or odors.
features.mattress_desc: Eliminate dust mites and allergens for a healthier sleep. Wake up feeling refreshed every day.
features.car_desc: Remove dirt and stains from your car interior, making every ride cleaner and more enjoyable.
features.stain_desc: Coffee spills, wine stains, or pet marks — we help lift and reduce tough stains effectively.

upholstery.features_main_desc: We take care of your essential furniture with attention to every detail, delivering deep cleanliness and long-lasting freshness.

home_clean.subtitle: Home Cleaning
home_clean.description: Enjoy a spotless home without the stress. Our professional cleaning service ensures every corner is fresh, hygienic, and comfortable.
home_clean.features_main_desc: We handle every part of your home with care and attention to detail.

features.general_desc: Keep your home fresh and tidy with routine cleaning.
features.deep_desc: Thorough cleaning for hidden dirt and buildup.
features.kitchen_desc: Degrease and sanitize your cooking space.

process.label: Our Process
process.title: Clean You Can Feel
process.desc: We follow a structured cleaning process to ensure consistency and high-quality results every time.

home_clean.final_cta_desc: Choose your preferred date and time. Our team is ready to take care of your home.

safe.title: Safer for Your Home
safe.desc: No need for live-in staff, reducing risks to your property and personal space.

pro.title: Professional Team
pro.desc: Trained cleaners with proper skills, etiquette, and reliability for consistent results.

save_cost.title: Save Long-Term Costs
save_cost.desc: Proper care helps extend the life of furniture and surfaces, reducing replacement costs.

save_time.title: Save Your Time
save_time.desc: Free up your time for work, family, or relaxation while we handle the cleaning.

flexible.title: Flexible Scheduling
flexible.desc: Choose the date, time, and frequency that fits your lifestyle.

custom.title: Focus on What Matters
custom.desc: Request special attention for specific areas to match your exact needs.

items.q: How long does the cleaning process take?
items.a: Most upholstery cleaning sessions take around 1–2 hours depending on size and condition.

items.q: How long until it dries?
items.a: Typically 3–6 hours. Our fast-drying process ensures minimal downtime.

items.q: Is it safe for pets and children?
items.a: Yes, we use eco-friendly and non-toxic solutions that are safe for your family.

items.q: Can you remove all stains?
items.a: We significantly reduce most stains, though some deep or old stains may not be completely removable.

items.q: How long does a home cleaning session take?
items.a: It typically takes 2–4 hours depending on the size of your home and the level of cleaning required.

items.q: Do I need to prepare anything before cleaning?
items.a: We recommend putting away personal items and valuables, but our team will handle the rest for you.

items.q: What cleaning products do you use?
items.a: We use high-quality, eco-friendly products that are safe for children, pets, and all surfaces.

items.q: Can I book regular cleaning services?
items.a: Yes, you can schedule weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly cleaning based on your needs.

items.q: Do you bring your own equipment?
items.a: Yes, our team comes fully equipped with all necessary tools and cleaning supplies.

disinfection.subtitle: Disinfection Cleaning
disinfection.title: Deep Clean. Disinfect. Protect.
disinfection.description: Eliminate germs and bacteria with professional disinfection for a safer, healthier space.

touchpoints.title: High-Touch Areas
touchpoints.desc: Door handles, switches, and frequently used surfaces.

disinfection.process_desc: We follow a structured process using safe, effective disinfectants to ensure complete coverage.

safe.title: Safe Products
safe.desc: Non-toxic and safe for people and pets.

confidence.title: Peace of Mind
confidence.desc: Feel confident in a cleaner environment.

disinfection.final_cta_desc: Book now and keep your home safe and hygienic.

items.q: What is included in the disinfection service?
items.a: We disinfect high-touch areas, bathrooms, kitchens, and all commonly used surfaces using professional-grade products.

items.q: Are the disinfectants safe?
items.a: Yes, we use safe and approved products that are non-toxic and suitable for homes with children and pets.

items.q: How long does the service take?
items.a: Typically 1–3 hours depending on the size of the area and level of treatment required.

items.q: Do I need to leave the house during disinfection?
items.a: In most cases, you can stay. However, we may recommend short ventilation time after the service.

items.q: How often should I book disinfection?
items.a: It depends on your lifestyle, but many customers choose monthly or after special situations like illness or moving in.

big_clean.subtitle: Big Cleaning
big_clean.title: Deep Cleaning for Every Corner
big_clean.description: A complete deep clean to remove hidden dirt, stains, and buildup — perfect for move-in, move-out, or a full reset.

entire.title: Entire Home
entire.desc: Full cleaning across all rooms and living spaces.

hidden.title: Hidden Areas
hidden.desc: Behind furniture, corners, and hard-to-reach spots.

kitchen.title: Kitchen Deep Clean
kitchen.desc: Remove grease, stains, and buildup thoroughly.

big_clean.process_desc: We follow a structured, detailed cleaning process to ensure every corner is thoroughly cleaned and refreshed.

deep.title: Deep & Thorough
deep.desc: Cleans beyond the surface for a complete refresh.

move.title: Perfect for Moving
move.desc: Ideal for move-in or move-out cleaning.

time.title: Save Time & Effort
time.desc: Let professionals handle heavy cleaning tasks.

big_clean.final_cta_title: Ready for a Full Deep Clean?
big_clean.final_cta_desc: Book now and give your home a complete refresh.

items.q: What is included in big cleaning?
items.a: Big cleaning covers a deep clean of your entire home, including hidden areas, kitchens, bathrooms, and hard-to-reach spots.

items.q: How is this different from regular cleaning?
items.a: Regular cleaning focuses on surface-level tasks, while big cleaning goes deeper to remove built-up dirt, stains, and hidden dust.

items.q: Is this suitable for move-in or move-out?
items.a: Yes, it's perfect for both move-in and move-out situations to ensure the space is fully cleaned and ready.

items.q: Do I need to prepare anything before the service?
items.a: We recommend removing personal belongings and small items to allow our team to clean thoroughly and efficiently.

items.q: How long does big cleaning take?
items.a: It depends on the size and condition of the space, but typically takes several hours to complete properly.

items.q: Will you move furniture?
items.a: Yes, we clean around and behind movable furniture when possible to reach hidden areas.

items.q: Do you remove tough stains and grease?
items.a: Yes, our team focuses on removing built-up stains, grease, and dirt as much as possible.

items.q: Is this a one-time service?
items.a: Yes, big cleaning is usually a one-time deep cleaning service, but you can follow up with regular cleaning afterward.

footer.brand_tagline: Thoughtful cleaning services for a cleaner, more comfortable home every day.
